headline: Build your Hub. Don't rebuild the runtime.
lead: Keep your Agent UI, models, accounts, permissions, cloud, and customer relationship. Embed libkungfu for local or worker runtime facts, Episode recovery, and portable KFD evidence.
claimBoundary: This is a first-party reference adopter, not external vendor adoption, certification, or OpenCode endorsement.

architectureSources.projectionRule: The site owns reader framing, non-normative synthesis, navigation, and visual composition. Kungfu owns Fact-Episode-Action runtime semantics; KFD owns cross-Hub protocol semantics.

documents.owns: Fact, Episode, Action Geometry, journal authority, and projection boundaries
Initiative, Assignment, settlement, Project Cut, and progressive disclosure
libkungfu system overview and data-plane summary
Minimal Hub implementation and receive algorithm

actionWorld.headline: How libkungfu turns action into an inspectable world
actionWorld.summary: libkungfu does not model everything. It preserves the coordinates needed to act without losing intent, evidence, authority, or continuity.

steps.label: Fact Cut N
steps.question: What is admitted now?
steps.detail: A rooted view of accepted state, not every observed or proposed claim.

steps.label: Action Geometry
steps.question: Why, from what view, under whose authority?
steps.detail: Pursuit preserves intent. Atlas preserves the declared perspective and sources. Warrant bounds permission.

steps.label: ActionBinding
steps.question: Which exact inputs authorize this candidate action?
steps.detail: An immutable intersection receipt over the Fact cut, Pursuit, Atlas, Warrant, action, and resource.

steps.label: Act
steps.question: What crosses into the real world?
steps.detail: The runtime may invoke tools or external systems, but success signals do not settle meaning.

steps.label: Episode
steps.question: What actually happened?
steps.detail: Causal occurrence, artifacts, receipts, consequences, recovery state, and verification roots.

steps.label: Inspect + admit
steps.question: Which consequences become Facts?
steps.detail: Local policy evaluates evidence and admits, rejects, degrades, or conflicts new claims.

steps.label: Fact Cut N+1
steps.question: What may safely happen next?
steps.detail: The successor cut begins the next action loop without rewriting prior occurrence.

foundation.label: Append-only journal authority
foundation.detail: Typed identity, admission, order, causality, lifecycle, Cuts, refs, and receipts.

foundation.label: Content-addressed bodies
foundation.detail: Immutable bytes become usable evidence only when a journal-committed root verifies them.

foundation.label: Rebuildable projections
foundation.detail: SQLite, CLI, GUI, JSON, Python, and Node views add access, never hidden authority.

hubNetwork.headline: KFD connects plural Hubs without becoming their control plane
hubNetwork.summary: Each Hub keeps its product, identity, policy, storage, models, and customer relationship. KFD standardizes only the responsibility exchange boundary.

hubs.label: Hub A · libkungfu adopter
layers: KFD adapter · exchange store and verdict writer

hubs.label: Hub B · independent implementation
layers: Any conforming runtime and evidence store
KFD adapter · exchange store and verdict writer

exchange.label: Negotiate
exchange.detail: Select one exact profile version and the safe capability intersection.

exchange.label: Propose
exchange.detail: Send rooted responsibility, causality, Warrant, disclosure, and payload commitments.

exchange.label: Deliver
exchange.detail: A replaceable binding returns transport evidence only.

exchange.label: Assess locally
exchange.detail: The receiver verifies, detects conflicts, applies policy, and writes its own rooted verdict.

hubNetwork.transport: Local call · IPC · file · HTTP · gRPC · message bus · removable media
hubNetwork.notOwned: No global identity provider, Hub registry, database, transport, clock, or mandatory KFD cloud.

supportReasons.mechanism: Exact profile coordinates and capability intersection
Content roots, predecessor causality, and idempotency keys
Visible conflict roots and append-only successor exchanges
Typed partial, redacted, reference-only, or withheld disclosure

invariants.detail: A receipt proves bytes arrived; the receiver still owns the verdict.
An Episode happened; success remains an independently assessed claim.
Controlling an identity does not prove permission, truth, or fact admission.

packages.name: @kungfu-tech/core
packages.role: Node binding over the native libkungfu authority

retained: Episode open, heartbeat, end, or abort lifecycle
Native timestamps and aggregate heartbeat counts
dropped: Provider, model, token, and credential data

qualification.recovery: SIGKILL restart recovered one unsealed Episode; export, import, and both fsck checks passed

knownLimits: No registry installation is claimed until public package artifacts exist.
The retained qualification observes Darwin arm64 only.
SIGKILL recovery is not physical power-loss or device-loss qualification.
The reference run used no model provider and proves no OpenCode endorsement.
